reviews.review_msg: Coleman is such an awesome prof! She is incredibly sweet, I took her class in my first semester and she helped me a lot! She really cares about her students and about the subject matter,. She also gives incredibly interesting lectures, I never dreaded going to her class! I definitely want to take another class with her soon!

Coleman is an amazing professor! If you take a class with her, you will not regret it! She tries her best to get to know her students and is very helpful when it comes to providing feedback. That being said, be prepared to engage with the material during class, so do your readings!

A fantastic professor and a fantastic person too! Although some of my peers weren't very interested in the course itself, I can guarantee that they all had a very positive experience with Steve. His passion and approachability are what make him a great prof and I'd recommend taking a course with him any day!
Prof was really great, you could tell he cares about his students and the course was super interesting. Lots of reading but the content was engaging and I learned a lot.

Aaron is an amazing and passionate prof. He really cares about his students and you can tell he cares about the topic. He gives a lot of homework and a lot of readings, but as long as you put in the effort, you will be happy.
